required_artifacts.purpose: list every submitted source item before acceptance or rejection
freeze accepted source files with stable hashes and provenance
required_artifacts.schema_alignment_note: These fields match repository/schemas/stages/source_snapshot_manifest.schema.json and repository/src/drd_harness/stages/source_snapshot.py. Multi-source grouping metadata stays in input_register and source_authority_index.

required_artifacts.purpose: declare which frozen sources are authoritative, reference-only, comparative, historical, or rejected
record secret, privacy, license, scope, and unsupported-type exclusions without losing auditability
declare exactly which source items may feed P3-SPEC-DISTILL and later modules
required_artifacts.schema_alignment_note: These fields match repository/schemas/stages/dependency_manifest.schema.json. Eligible and blocked source item detail stays in source_authority_index and redaction_and_exclusion_log, then is referenced by input_artifacts and output_artifacts.

artifact_rule: Every downstream source claim must cite an artifact_id, local path, source_item_id when applicable, and hash. Artifacts with schema_ref must use that schema required-field shape exactly; P3-specific grouping metadata belongs in adjacent source intake artifacts instead of changing the bound schema.
